description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, dark-colored roof featuring a stepped design. The exterior walls are light beige, contrasting with the dark roof, and the structure sits on a large, green rectangular plot. The front facade includes a recessed entryway and a set of large, vertically oriented windows, while the rear features a combination of solid wall sections and additional window groupings. The side elevations are relatively plain, with minimal fenestration and a strong horizontal emphasis. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on simplicity and functional layout.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, stepped dark roof and light beige walls, featuring large windows and a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed entryway, large vertical windows, and the stepped roof design.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, uninterrupted beige wall and the extended roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying grouped windows and a solid wall section beneath the stepped roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of window groupings and solid wall, plus the visible roof step.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
